notes: Forward returns at 5/20/60d horizons overlap across consecutive daily signals; effective independent sample is far below nominal n. Directional evidence only — not grounds for mechanical parameter changes.
v8 telemetry (divergence, hostile_review, regime driver/basis) began accruing mid-June 2026; sections 2-4 deepen with time.
Temporal z baseline excludes the most recent observation; generate-signals consumes the stored baseline next morning (one-day staleness, immaterial at window 60).

tactical.falsifier: LHX gives back the day's gain and closes below the SMA50 ($299.78) on rising volume, confirming the rally was a fade and rotation pressure persists — would flip tactical toward neutral/positive.

positional.falsifier: Next earnings shows book-to-bill <0.95 with backlog YoY flat/negative AND op margin failing to recover above ~11% — that flips positional to neutral/trim.

strategic.falsifier: Management guides op margin recovery to >13% with a credible path to mid-teens on the next call (or a major multi-billion program award) — that flips strategic to negative/buy.

tactical.falsifier: RSI spiking above 75 with a parabolic multi-day surge (trim) or a >8% single-day non-fundamental drop (buy) would flip the sign.

positional.falsifier: A drawdown of >15% from highs (buy) or a confirmed break below the 200-day SMA with deteriorating orders (trim) would flip the sign.

strategic.falsifier: Forward P/E breaking above 45x on a guide-down, OR TSMC+Samsung+Intel all cutting capex simultaneously (trim), versus a >15% drawdown pushing forward P/E under 25x (buy).

tactical.falsifier: A break and hold below the 200-day SMA ($472.83) on volume, or conversely a decisive reclaim of the 50-day ($514.98) with QUAL flow turning sharply positive vs SPY.

positional.falsifier: BBB OAS blowing out past ~130bps (project-IRR headwind) OR LIN opening a >15% premium to peer avg (over-priced quality), either of which flips the positional read.

strategic.falsifier: A confirmed >$1B hydrogen or semi on-site contract announcement, or a decisive DXY reversal, would flip this to a negative (buy) score; conversely a genuine price/mix-ex-FX turning negative with backlog contraction would push it more positive.

tactical.falsifier: RSI breaking below 35 on accelerating volume (capitulation confirming further downside) OR a decisive reclaim of the 50-day at ~$400 on strong breadth — either flips the tactical read.

positional.falsifier: A quarter showing Azure CC decelerating below 22% AND op margin compressing on capex — that confirms thesis impairment and flips positional to a trim; conversely a reclaim of the 200-day would confirm the buy.

strategic.falsifier: Azure CC re-accelerating above 30% with stable margins would flip this to a strong strategic buy; conversely OpenAI partnership deterioration (IP/AGI/exclusivity loss) or Azure sub-22% decel would flip strategic to trim.

tactical.falsifier: A sharp move in the 10Y (>25bps in a session) either direction that decouples ENB from its narrow trading range would flip this from neutral to a directional tactical read.

positional.falsifier: The yield spread widening back above ~150bps — via either a 10Y rally toward 4.0% or an ENB price drop — would flip this from trim to accumulate.

strategic.falsifier: A rate-cut cycle materializing (BoC/Fed) that pushes the 10Y meaningfully lower and re-expands ENB's yield spread above 150bps, or a dividend growth acceleration guide, would flip strategic to accumulate.

tactical.falsifier: A decisive RSI break above 65 with price reclaiming the $14.79 50-day on volume would flip this to a buy; conversely an RSI break below 40 with loss of the 200-day would flip it to a trim.

positional.falsifier: GLNCY flipping to underperform COPX by >3pp alongside widening HY spreads (>350bps) would flip this positive/trim; a sustained copper breakout with GLNCY still leading would push it more strongly negative.

strategic.falsifier: Confirmation the earnings trough is deepening — copper below $3.80/lb, coal price collapse, and trading EBITDA guidance cut below $2B — would flip this to neutral/trim; a copper breakout above $4.75 with rising Chinese demand data would deepen the buy.

tactical.falsifier: RSI breaking below 30 (would push tactical negative/buy) or a sustained funding-rate spike >0.05% with RSI>70 (would push tactical positive/trim).

positional.falsifier: Sustained net positive IBIT creation flows for 2+ weeks combined with a reclaim of the 50DMA would confirm the buy and push me toward -80; conversely a break below the $32.84 52w low on accelerating outflows would flip me positive (regime break, cut risk).

strategic.falsifier: Evidence of structural ETF flow saturation or a policy reversal on crypto regulation would push strategic clearly positive; a sovereign/major-institution BTC reserve adoption event would push it negative.

tactical.falsifier: A sharp MXN move (>18.3 or <16.8) or a break of the 200-day SMA on volume would give a directional tactical signal and flip this off zero.

positional.falsifier: A decisive Banxico dovish pivot driving MXN past 18.5, or a downside volume/margin miss, would turn the positional setup negative (positive score).

strategic.falsifier: A sustained MXN regime break above ~18.5 (from tariff shock or aggressive Banxico cuts) or evidence of Mexican consumer volume contraction would flip the strategic thesis to trim.

tactical.falsifier: A decisive close above the 50-day ($18.05) on strong volume with WTI holding $84+ would flip this to a buy-tilt as the technical downtrend breaks.

positional.falsifier: An official announcement cutting the ordinary dividend policy or mandating a large non-accretive refining/renewables capex program would flip this positive (trim).

strategic.falsifier: A credible multi-year capital allocation framework preserving high payouts alongside sustained WTI above $80 would flip this to a buy-tilt; conversely confirmation is already trim-leaning.

tactical.falsifier: A sharp week-over-week WCI/SCFI spike (>15%) on a new disruption would flip this to a clear buy; conversely a break below the 50-day on collapsing rates would deepen the trim.

positional.falsifier: GSCPI dropping below 0 combined with WCI falling under key contract levels would flip positional negative-to-positive decisively; sustained GSCPI >1.5 with rate strength would push it back to buy.

strategic.falsifier: A dividend/buyback cut signaling balance-sheet stress, or P/B breaking decisively above 1.0 on a peak-earnings surge (cycle-top warning), would flip the strategic sign.

tactical.falsifier: If TMO gives back the rally and drawdown-from-high re-widens past -15% while XBI holds firm (sympathy buy re-activating), the tactical sign flips negative.

positional.falsifier: XBI 90d rolling back below +10% (thaw stalling) or TMO losing its 30d lead over DHR would flip this to a trim/neutral posture.

strategic.falsifier: A guide-down showing organic growth failing to inflect off the ~1% trough (destocking extending) combined with China/NIH deterioration would flip strategic to a trim.

tactical.falsifier: A decisive break below the $81 52w low on rising volume (flipping to a momentum-short/no-edge posture) would flip the sign positive; conversely a reclaim of SMA50 ($104) would deepen conviction negative.

positional.falsifier: A confirmed cRPO deceleration to <18% or two consecutive quarters of negative EPS revisions with margin compression from AI costs would flip this to a hold/trim (positive); conversely a cRPO re-acceleration print would push toward the engine's -95.

strategic.falsifier: Evidence the secular thesis is breaking — cRPO structurally below 18%, Now Assist ASP/attach-rate stalling, or a major federal contract loss — would flip this positive; a real-rate decline toward 0.5% plus cRPO re-acceleration would deepen the buy.

tactical.falsifier: A break back below the 50-day ($506) on rising volume, or the duopoly-vs-SPY spread flipping negative (fear re-entering), would flip this to a positive/trim tactical score.

positional.falsifier: Cross-border volume growth printing <6% on the next earnings call, or EPS revisions turning net negative 30d/90d, would flip the positional thesis to trim.

strategic.falsifier: Interchange/network-fee legislation advancing to a floor vote (or passing), OR measurable stablecoin displacement at real-economy merchants appearing in disclosures, would flip strategic to trim.

tactical.falsifier: Confirmation that the Q2 print showed procedure growth beating/within guide with no material transition quantification would confirm the sell-off is pure narrative (score more negative); conversely, confirmation of a procedure miss below 12% or material transition quantification would flip me toward zero/positive.

positional.falsifier: A stabilization/base forming above the 52w low with EPS revisions turning up would confirm the buy; a continued breakdown to new lows with negative EPS revisions would flip me toward neutral/trim.

strategic.falsifier: Management quantifying the 2027 transition as material, or evidence of measurable US procedure-share loss to Hugo/Ottava, would flip the strategic sign positive; continued procedure beats with transition framed as manageable would confirm/deepen the buy.
